blocks.title: Vocabulary — Talking about languages
blocks.content: Complete the sentences with the correct words: fluent, get by, struggled, express, picked it up, accent, fluently, mastering.

blocks.title: The Google Translators in Human Form
Exercise 9
answers: But how far is this true?
There is also evidence that he could use many languages.
There will be a growing number of hyperglots in the future.
Top performers may have genes that allow them to get the most from their training.
They often have limited opportunities in terms of individual languages.
They have opportunities to use the language closer to home.
